note: Manual prompt-quality gate for the Evaluator stage. Each fixture supplies a cleaned question + an original search plan + simulated round-1 search results, and asserts what the Evaluator should decide (sufficient vs. refined_plan). Not executed in CI — run manually before any NEW_PIPELINE flag change.

fixtures.description: Search returned clearly relevant material in two sources → Evaluator should accept (sufficient: true)

input.cleanedQuestion: Zapier integration stopped syncing leads after a tenant migration

originalPlan.rationale: Recent breakage; Confluence and Slack are most likely.

confluence.text:
[Confluence] Zapier integration — common issues after tenant migration
The API access toggle in Tenant Settings → Integrations can be reset to OFF during migration. Re-enabling restores sync within ~10 minutes.
https://example.atlassian.net/wiki/x

slack.text:
[#integrations] Customer Zapier broke after migration — turned out to be API access toggle. Re-enabled, sync resumed.
https://slack.com/archives/x/y

fixtures.description: Search returned a result, but about a different integration → Evaluator should refine, not accept
